record.field: ① 課税売上額（税抜き）
3. Amount of exports, etc. of non-taxable assets, value of assets transferred to overseas branches, etc.
③ 非課税資産の輸出等の金額、海外支店等へ移送した資産の価額
4. Amount of consideration for transfer of taxable assets (1+2+3)
④ 課税資産の譲渡等の対価の額(①＋②＋③)
5. Amount of consideration for transfer, etc. of taxable assets (amount in 4)
⑤ 課税資産の譲渡等の対価の額（④の金額）
7. Amount of consideration for asset transfer, etc. (5+6)
⑦ 資産の譲渡等の対価の額（⑤＋⑥）
⑧ 課税売上割合（④ / ⑦）
9. Amount paid for taxable purchases (tax included)
⑨ 課税仕入れに係る支払対価の額（税込み）
10. Consumption tax amount on taxable purchases
⑩ 課税仕入れに係る消費税額
(Deduction) Consumption tax amount on taxable purchases
(Accumulation) Consumption tax amount on taxable purchases

11. Amount of consideration paid (tax included) for taxable purchases that are subject to transitional measures regarding taxable purchases made from parties other than qualified invoice issuing businesses
⑪ 適格請求書発行事業者以外の者から行った課税仕入れに係る経過措置の適用を受ける課税仕入れに係る支払対価の額（税込み）

12. Amount deemed to be the consumption tax amount related to taxable purchases due to transitional measures related to taxable purchases made from parties other than qualified invoice issuing businesses
⑫ 適格請求書発行事業者以外の者から行った課税仕入れに係る経過措置により課税仕入れに係る消費税額とみなされる額
13. Amount of consideration paid for specified taxable purchases
⑬ 特定課税仕入れに係る支払対価の額
14. Consumption tax amount on specified taxable purchases
⑭ 特定課税仕入れに係る消費税額
15. Consumption tax amount on taxable cargo
⑮ 課税貨物に係る消費税額
16. Amount of adjustment (addition or subtraction) to the amount of consumption tax in the case of not receiving (receiving) exemption from tax liability
⑯ 納税義務の免除を受けない（受ける）こととなった場合における消費税額の調整（加算又は減算）額
17. Total amount of tax on taxable purchases, etc. (10+12+14+15±16)
⑰ 課税仕入れ等の税額の合計額(⑩＋⑫＋⑭＋⑮±⑯)
18. If the taxable sales amount is 500 million yen or less and the taxable sales ratio is 95% or more, ⑱ (amount in ⑰)
⑱ 課税売上高が５億円以下、かつ、課税売上割合が95％以上の場合⑱（⑰の金額）
If taxable sales exceed 500 million yen or taxable sales ratio is less than 95%
課税売上高が５億円超又は課税売上割合が95％未満の場合
19. Of 17, those required only for taxable sales
⑲ ⑰のうち、課税売上げにのみ要するもの
20. Of 17, what is required in common for taxable sales and non-taxable sales
⑳ ⑰のうち、課税売上げと非課税売上げに共通して要するもの
21. Tax amount of taxable purchases, etc. deducted using the itemized method (19+(20*4/7)
㉑ 個別対応方式により控除する課税仕入れ等の税額（⑲＋(⑳×④ / ⑦）
22. Tax amount of taxable purchases, etc. deducted by lump-sum proportional distribution method (17×4/7)
㉒ 一括比例配分方式により控除する課税仕入れ等の税額（⑰×④ / ⑦）
Adjustment amount for deduction tax amount
23. Adjustment (addition or subtraction) amount of consumption tax related to fixed assets subject to adjustment when taxable sales ratio changes
㉓ 課税売上割合変動時の調整対象固定資産に係る消費税額の調整（加算又は減算）額
24. Adjustment (addition or subtraction) amount when fixed assets subject to adjustment are converted to taxable business (tax-exempt business)
㉔ 調整対象固定資産を課税業務用（非課税業務用）に転用した場合の調整（加算又は減算）額
25. Additional amount when a residential rental building is used for taxable rental (transfer)
㉕ 居住用賃貸建物を課税賃貸用に供した（譲渡した）場合の加算額
26. When the deductible input tax amount [(18, 21 or 22 amount) ± 23 ± 24 + 25] is positive
㉖ 控除対象仕入税額[(⑱,㉑又は㉒の金額)±㉓±㉔+㉕]がプラスの時
DED_S2_3_18.balance_a + DED_S2_3_21.balance_a + DED_S2_3_22.balance_a + DED_S2_3_23.balance_a + DED_S2_3_24.balance_a + DED_S2_3_25.balance_a
DED_S2_3_18.balance_b + DED_S2_3_21.balance_b + DED_S2_3_22.balance_b + DED_S2_3_23.balance_b + DED_S2_3_24.balance_b + DED_S2_3_25.balance_b
DED_S2_3_18.balance_c + DED_S2_3_21.balance_c + DED_S2_3_22.balance_c + DED_S2_3_23.balance_c + DED_S2_3_24.balance_c + DED_S2_3_25.balance_c
27. When the deduction excessive adjustment tax amount [(amount of 18, 21 or 22) ± 23 ± 24 + 25] is negative
㉗ 控除過大調整税額[(⑱,㉑又は㉒の金額)±㉓±㉔+㉕]がマイナスの時
28. Consumption tax amount related to bad debt collection
㉘ 貸倒回収に係る消費税額
